reason: The statement applies because Saul, as a servant of his father Kish, took the initiative to seek the lost asses and also sought the guidance of a man of God to show them their way. Saul and his servant showed appreciation towards the man of God by offering a present of silver. Additionally, Saul was anointed by Samuel as captain over the people of Israel to save them from the Philistines, indicating divine favor and protection.
